observations: runx-cli 0.6.14 was used for publish, registry read, clean install, local harness, installed-package harness, the post-publish dogfood run, and receipt verification.
The verified publisher and PR author are RYDE-PLAY/ryde-play, and the exact package is ryde-play/contract-drafter@sha-8f10f3657a3c.
PR 334 contains X.yaml, SKILL.md, both JSON fixtures, harness evidence, the deterministic runner and tests, plus the generated packet schema at source commit a7ee625855088af9394900ac0e79b667cfe47b76.
Registry read resolved digest sha256:18710b89ac00256fc41ca93788b1c75a1e19c9353d166ea5f71e836e980f3109 and profile digest sha256:a37fb2462c37f4a2aefae049f56121eee4950588e5b9e77d90e21d72a430c504.

A clean runx add installed the exact immutable version with runners draft and refusal_check; X.yaml and run.mjs are byte-identical to source and SKILL.md matches after the registry's final-newline normalization.
The local signed harness passed 2/2 before publish, the hosted registry harness passed 2/2 after publish, and the clean installed-package harness passed 2/2.
Hosted harness case complete-template-produces-gated-draft sealed, while missing-required-term-refuses-without-proposal refused through refusal_check with no draft and no proposal.
The missing-term refusal reason is terms.payment_terms is required; refusal output has draft_doc=null, deviations=[], and send_proposal=null.
The real dogfood command invoked the published registry ref, not the source directory or a harness fixture, and stdout returned status=sealed with run_id run_draft_7bd5705a3d7a.
Dogfood receipt id is sha256:4dc88c84fd87417183cb31873422178c9b9e227b953b76d8aacac7bb7f17a568.
The runtime wrote that exact receipt id into a dedicated receipt store; the persisted JSON is canonically identical to dogfood-run.json.receipt and was copied without re-minting.

The dogfood receipt is distinct from hosted harness receipts sha256:88c59b044eccadb0f94f3f7783e252c958587943b70f65ddd7dcdecf7e697b97 and sha256:d7f2e7e77d58cfe0d84f71bc4665702af6fb8441133bc133c558d4a4657fc65f.

Stock runx graph turns encode the receipt subject ref as type=harness; this is nevertheless the runtime-persisted post-publish skill receipt, proven by the sealed run output, registry provenance, matching run id, exact store selection, and review act rather than an observation receipt.

The persisted receipt act has form=review, summary draft_ready template=public-services-review-v1 deviations=4 downstream=runx/send-as status=not_sent, and artifact runx:contract-draft:c29a7681049d5b7e.
runx verify returned valid=true, signature.status=valid, signature.mode=production, receipt id sha256:4dc88c84fd87417183cb31873422178c9b9e227b953b76d8aacac7bb7f17a568, and no findings.
Draft ref is runx:contract-draft:c29a7681049d5b7e with content digest sha256:3151d32d9990cecdc7ce37f0ee86ced4ced49b4f38a9476603b182c1aee7d5e7.
Deviation confidentiality/confidentiality_period records baseline 3 years and proposed change 2 years.
Deviation governing-law/governing_law records baseline California and proposed change Delaware.
Deviation liability/liability_cap records baseline Fees paid in the prior 12 months and proposed change USD 80,000 aggregate.
Deviation fees/payment_terms records baseline Net 30 and proposed change Net 45.
send_proposal has status=gated_not_sent, gate_id=contract-drafter.send.approval, human_approval_required=true, approved=false, provider_action=null, and no_send_performed=true.
send_proposal.consumer names runx/send-as runner plan and supplies objective, principal, audience, content_ref, consent_basis, and operator_context matching the official send-as input contract.
The template and dogfood input are immutable public synthetic artifacts; the runner uses only template, parties, and terms and validates no invented parties, clauses, or terms.

GitHub CI js-checks, demo-checks, and gitleaks pass at the submitted PR head; the remaining authoring-smoke and Rust failures reproduce unrelated repository baseline failures and do not include contract-drafter.

commands.dogfood: runx skill ryde-play/contract-drafter@sha-8f10f3657a3c --registry https://api.runx.ai --receipt-dir <dedicated-runtime-receipt-dir> --json --input-json "template=$(jq -c '.template' public/dogfood-input.json)" --input-json "parties=$(jq -c '.parties' public/dogfood-input.json)" --input-json "terms=$(jq -c '.terms' public/dogfood-input.json)"

dogfood.command: runx skill ryde-play/contract-drafter@sha-8f10f3657a3c --registry https://api.runx.ai --receipt-dir <dedicated-runtime-receipt-dir> --json <template, parties, and terms loaded from the immutable input artifact>

deviations.baseline: Fees paid in the prior 12 months

summary: Published ryde-play/contract-drafter@sha-8f10f3657a3c from RYDE-PLAY PR 334, passed local, hosted, and clean-installed harnesses, then ran the exact registry version on immutable synthetic contract inputs. The runtime returned sealed, persisted the same receipt submitted here, recorded four explicit template deviations and a gated unsent send-as proposal, and passed production-signature verification with no findings.
